comment: Hobby plan allows a max of 2 cron jobs, each running at most once per day. The every-5-min fixture/score sync is handled by an external cron-job.org pinger hitting /api/cron/sync-fixtures?secret=CRON_SECRET, so it is intentionally NOT declared here. If you upgrade to Vercel Pro, you can re-add { "path": "/api/cron/sync-fixtures", "schedule": "*/5 * * * *" } and tighten the others.
